name: Spectate
desc: Spectator mode player teleports to another entity or player by UUID. Only works in spectator gamemode (3).

fields.name: targetUUID
fields.desc: UUID of the entity to spectate/follow

encoding: UUID as two longs (most/least significant bits)
notes: Only processed by the server if the player is in spectator mode (gamemode=3). The server teleports the player's camera to the target entity's position. MultiAura modules (Aqua 13, Memeware 7.3) use C18 to teleport to targets for aura attack sequences.

implementation.overview: C18PacketSpectate allows a spectator-mode player to teleport to any entity by UUID. The server processes this only for gamemode=3. Exploited by MultiAura modules (Memeware 7.3 MultiAura sends C18 to spectate-attack targets) and FreeCam (teleport to target entity while in freecam). Aqua 13 Disabler imports C18PacketSpectate for spectate-based bypass modes.

modules.name: MultiAura Spectate Attack (Memeware 7.3)
modules.purpose: Teleport to a target entity via C18 and immediately attack them via C02UseEntity. This teleports the player to the target (in spectator mode), allowing attacks from unexpected positions.
modules.how_it_works: Every attack tick, the module sends C18 with the target's UUID (teleports to them), then sends C02UseEntity ATTACK, then teleports back to the original position via another C18. This is only effective in spectator mode where C18 teleport is allowed.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayServer.processSpectate(C18PacketSpectate) — validates spectator mode, finds entity by UUID, sets the player's spectating target. Client-side: The vanilla spectator menu sends this when clicking 'Teleport to player'.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: C18 only works in spectator mode. Using it in survival mode is silently ignored by the server. MultiAura spectate attacks are only effective on servers with /gamemode spectator access.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: Vanilla spectator GUI sends C18. Memeware 7.3 MultiAura sends C18 + C02 for spectate-combat. Aqua 13 Disabler imports C18.

Server: NetHandlerPlayServer.processSpectate(C18PacketSpectate) — only processes if player is in spectator mode.
implementation.client_variations:
Memeware 7.3: MultiAura sends C18 + C02 + C18 for spectate attack.
Aqua 13: Disabler imports C18 for spectate-based bypass modes.
Gugustus: No specific C18 module.
Rise 6.0: C18 is in PingSpoofComponent delay list.
Sigma 4.11: No specific C18 module.
